test.name: Confirm no impossibilities on a well-formed mid-research project
test.description: Run warnings check on the Flynn project. The current data is internally consistent -- birth ~1845, censuses at ages 5 and 15, death 1908 all line up. The skill should confirm cleanly without false-positive warnings on this valid data. A useful negative result is part of this skill's value.

input.user_message: Check Patrick Flynn's evidence for any impossibilities or warnings.

judge_context: Should examine all assertions linked to person I1 via person_evidence (a_001-a_005 from 1850 census, a_008-a_010 from 1860 census, a_011-a_013 from death cert)
Should confirm the timeline is consistent: birth ~1845, age 5 in 1850 (consistent with 1845 birth), age 15 in 1860 (consistent), died 1908 -- no chronological impossibilities
Should NOT flag the resolved birthplace conflict c_001 as a current warning -- conflicts that are `status: resolved` are no longer active issues
Should NOT flag the 48-year gap between 1860 and 1908 as an impossibility -- gaps are timeline territory, not check-warnings territory
